mapper.sql: PT_NO, MEMBER_PT_NO, MEMBER_NO, CONT_NO, ORG_NO, ISU_DY, ISU_DT, BAL_PT, ISU_PT, ISU_CANCEL_PT, USE_PT, USE_CANCEL_PT, EXP_PT, USE_START_DT, USE_END_DT, EXP_DT, EXP_PROC_DT, REG_USER_ID, REG_DT, LAST_MOD_USER_ID, LAST_MOD_DT
mapper.select:
select
distinct
from t_pt_mst
order by ${orderByClause}
mapper.insert: insert into t_pt_mst (PT_NO, MEMBER_PT_NO, MEMBER_NO, CONT_NO, ORG_NO, ISU_DY, ISU_DT, BAL_PT, ISU_PT, ISU_CANCEL_PT, USE_PT, USE_CANCEL_PT, EXP_PT, USE_START_DT, USE_END_DT, EXP_DT, EXP_PROC_DT, REG_USER_ID, REG_DT, LAST_MOD_USER_ID, LAST_MOD_DT ) values (#{ptNo,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{memberPtNo,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{memberNo,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{contNo,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{orgNo,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{isuDy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{isuDt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{balPt,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{isuPt,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{isuCancelPt,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{usePt,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{useCancelPt,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{expPt,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{useStartDt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{useEndDt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{expDt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{expProcDt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{regUserId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{regDt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{lastModUserId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{lastModDt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} )

insert into t_pt_mst
PT_NO,
MEMBER_PT_NO,
MEMBER_NO,
CONT_NO,
ORG_NO,
ISU_DY,
ISU_DT,
BAL_PT,
ISU_PT,
ISU_CANCEL_PT,
USE_PT,
USE_CANCEL_PT,
EXP_PT,
USE_START_DT,
USE_END_DT,
EXP_DT,
EXP_PROC_DT,
REG_USER_ID,
REG_DT,
LAST_MOD_USER_ID,
LAST_MOD_DT,
#{ptNo,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{memberPtNo,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{memberNo,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{contNo,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{orgNo,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{isuDy,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{isuDt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{balPt,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{isuPt,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{isuCancelPt,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{usePt,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{useCancelPt,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{expPt,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{useStartDt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{useEndDt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{expDt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{expProcDt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{regUserId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{regDt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{lastModUserId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{lastModDt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
mapper.update:
update t_pt_mst
PT_NO = #{row.ptNo,jdbcType=BIGINT},
MEMBER_PT_NO = #{row.memberPtNo,jdbcType=BIGINT},
MEMBER_NO = #{row.memberNo,jdbcType=BIGINT},
CONT_NO = #{row.contNo,jdbcType=BIGINT},
ORG_NO = #{row.orgNo,jdbcType=BIGINT},
ISU_DY = #{row.isuDy,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
ISU_DT = #{row.isuDt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
BAL_PT = #{row.balPt,jdbcType=BIGINT},
ISU_PT = #{row.isuPt,jdbcType=BIGINT},
ISU_CANCEL_PT = #{row.isuCancelPt,jdbcType=BIGINT},
USE_PT = #{row.usePt,jdbcType=BIGINT},
USE_CANCEL_PT = #{row.useCancelPt,jdbcType=BIGINT},
EXP_PT = #{row.expPt,jdbcType=BIGINT},
USE_START_DT = #{row.useStartDt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
USE_END_DT = #{row.useEndDt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
EXP_DT = #{row.expDt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
EXP_PROC_DT = #{row.expProcDt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
REG_USER_ID = #{row.regUserId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
REG_DT = #{row.regDt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
LAST_MOD_USER_ID = #{row.lastModUserId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
LAST_MOD_DT = #{row.lastModDt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},

update t_pt_mst set PT_NO = #{row.ptNo,jdbcType=BIGINT}, MEMBER_PT_NO = #{row.memberPtNo,jdbcType=BIGINT}, MEMBER_NO = #{row.memberNo,jdbcType=BIGINT}, CONT_NO = #{row.contNo,jdbcType=BIGINT}, ORG_NO = #{row.orgNo,jdbcType=BIGINT}, ISU_DY = #{row.isuDy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ISU_DT = #{row.isuDt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, BAL_PT = #{row.balPt,jdbcType=BIGINT}, ISU_PT = #{row.isuPt,jdbcType=BIGINT}, ISU_CANCEL_PT = #{row.isuCancelPt,jdbcType=BIGINT}, USE_PT = #{row.usePt,jdbcType=BIGINT}, USE_CANCEL_PT = #{row.useCancelPt,jdbcType=BIGINT}, EXP_PT = #{row.expPt,jdbcType=BIGINT}, USE_START_DT = #{row.useStartDt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, USE_END_DT = #{row.useEndDt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, EXP_DT = #{row.expDt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, EXP_PROC_DT = #{row.expProcDt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, REG_USER_ID = #{row.regUserId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, REG_DT = #{row.regDt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, LAST_MOD_USER_ID = #{row.lastModUserId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, LAST_MOD_DT = #{row.lastModDt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}

update t_pt_mst
MEMBER_PT_NO = #{memberPtNo,jdbcType=BIGINT},
MEMBER_NO = #{memberNo,jdbcType=BIGINT},
CONT_NO = #{contNo,jdbcType=BIGINT},
ORG_NO = #{orgNo,jdbcType=BIGINT},
ISU_DY = #{isuDy,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
ISU_DT = #{isuDt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
BAL_PT = #{balPt,jdbcType=BIGINT},
ISU_PT = #{isuPt,jdbcType=BIGINT},
ISU_CANCEL_PT = #{isuCancelPt,jdbcType=BIGINT},
USE_PT = #{usePt,jdbcType=BIGINT},
USE_CANCEL_PT = #{useCancelPt,jdbcType=BIGINT},
EXP_PT = #{expPt,jdbcType=BIGINT},
USE_START_DT = #{useStartDt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
USE_END_DT = #{useEndDt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
EXP_DT = #{expDt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
EXP_PROC_DT = #{expProcDt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
REG_USER_ID = #{regUserId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
REG_DT = #{regDt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
LAST_MOD_USER_ID = #{lastModUserId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
LAST_MOD_DT = #{lastModDt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
where PT_NO = #{ptNo,jdbcType=BIGINT}

update t_pt_mst set MEMBER_PT_NO = #{memberPtNo,jdbcType=BIGINT}, MEMBER_NO = #{memberNo,jdbcType=BIGINT}, CONT_NO = #{contNo,jdbcType=BIGINT}, ORG_NO = #{orgNo,jdbcType=BIGINT}, ISU_DY = #{isuDy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ISU_DT = #{isuDt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, BAL_PT = #{balPt,jdbcType=BIGINT}, ISU_PT = #{isuPt,jdbcType=BIGINT}, ISU_CANCEL_PT = #{isuCancelPt,jdbcType=BIGINT}, USE_PT = #{usePt,jdbcType=BIGINT}, USE_CANCEL_PT = #{useCancelPt,jdbcType=BIGINT}, EXP_PT = #{expPt,jdbcType=BIGINT}, USE_START_DT = #{useStartDt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, USE_END_DT = #{useEndDt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, EXP_DT = #{expDt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, EXP_PROC_DT = #{expProcDt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, REG_USER_ID = #{regUserId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, REG_DT = #{regDt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, LAST_MOD_USER_ID = #{lastModUserId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, LAST_MOD_DT = #{lastModDt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} where PT_NO = #{ptNo,jdbcType=BIGINT}
